Malaise  

Description

2: Decrease Cold Resist by 6 (L18) to 26 (L29)
3: Decrease Magic Resist by 6 (L18) to 26 (L29)
4: Decrease Poison Resist by 6 (L18) to 26 (L29)
5: Decrease Fire Resist by 6 (L18) to 26 (L29)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 60 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 6
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel somewhat vulnerable.
Cast on other: Soandso looks somewhat uncomfortable.
Effect Fades: Your vulnerability fades.

Game Description

Decreases your target's resistance to cold, fire, magic, and poison.

Items with this effect

  • Drake-Hide Amice
  • Spell: Malaise

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Malaise
ClassLevel
MAG22
SHM18
Expansion:

Duration:
4.6 mins @L18 to 14.0 mins @L65
  • Comments (17)
  • Sold By (16)
  • NPCs with Ability (13)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
Merchant Pricing for Spell
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2012 at 2:24 PM Rating: Decent
Lilpapei
Scholar
428 posts
As far as I can determine, based on visits to four merchants, the correct price for this spell is 1.1.6.1... Both Freeport vendors had it listed as this as well as the two Library merchants...

Edited, Dec 15th 2013 9:41am by Lilpapei
▲ Page top
Cabilis location
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2006 at 7:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763921987
5 posts
Vessel Grymm in East Cabilis sells this also.
▲ Page top
Sold in West Freeport
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2006 at 11:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781383699
15 posts
Odemi Partun sells this spell in West Freeport.

Edited, Jul 3rd 2006 at 12:24pm EDT by Anaxandrides
▲ Page top
Fizzle Fest Training
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2006 at 8:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775161694
View User Forum
62 posts
Best advice I can give any caster, every 5 levels (or more if needed) stop the leveling and catch up your casting skills.

I go to PoK I have a Spell set called PRACTICE. I load the lowest level of each spell skill type.

Then I cast on the guards away from everyone else or go in the Library and cast on one of the vendors in the back. You max your skills, you are more effective to your groups and your guild.

Semper Fidelis et Paratus! /ALE
(Always Faithful & Prepared)
▲ Page top
What resist line?
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2005 at 4:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361789685
Scholar
59 posts
what does this get dice-thrown against? Is it a disease based spell i.e. vs Resist?
▲ Page top
RE: What resist line?
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2005 at 4:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801176674
View User Forum
Scholar
67 posts
"Resist: Magic (0)"
▲ Page top
In Neriak
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2005 at 11:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262193764
5 posts
I found mine in Neriak Commons off from Mys S'Tai in the Mage Guild.

Edited, Thu Apr 28 00:28:48 2005
▲ Page top
how to cure
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2004 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260127882
111 posts
Can this spell be cured if cast on you? Counteract disease or curse maybe?
▲ Page top
RE: how to cure
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2004 at 4:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777513646
View User Forum
Sage
246 posts
Cancel Magic can remove it, but odds are high you will remove all your other buffs before removing this one. However, if it's the only thing cast on you (or you have the mana to rebuff) then it's a way to remove it. Did this just last night in Highkeep since I was just self buffing for most the night. At one point I had some shammy buffs so I didn't bother and just toughed it out. Gnome power! Gno Mercy for the weak! :)

Edited, Wed Apr 21 17:04:25 2004
▲ Page top
RE: how to cure
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2005 at 4:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801176674
View User Forum
Scholar
67 posts
2 words ... trash buff. put a worthless buff on yerself first and then get all other buffs ... cancel trash buff and the debuff will go in the first slot ... thus you can cancel it and not yer buffs.
▲ Page top
Where
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2003 at 7:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792689141
3 posts
You can also buy this in Qeynos South, NPC: Headara Ponido, Magician Guild
▲ Page top
Fizzle Festival!
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2003 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258917101
2 posts
I don't know about you other level 24 mages, but my Alteration skill is LOW. (Like 20 or 30 I think.) So this spell has been a fizzle fest of the worst mana-draining kind.

Did everyone else have to discipline to max out all five spell skills before using this a lot?
▲ Page top
where else to buy
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2003 at 12:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781960745
View User Forum
15 posts
Can also be bought in gukta.
▲ Page top
Info
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 7:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784254458
124 posts
spell does not stack with the tash spell line. One piece of advice i can give to you about this spell is to get it. If you go to HHK at at about this level (or just about anywhere else) mobs really like to resist your spells.
▲ Page top
RE: Info
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 10:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
That's odd. Every other Malo-line spell stacks with evey other tash-line.

This spell is also found at the vendor Mistic Pikor in Plane of knowledge. It is spelled differentlly though, Malaise.
